message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-krug" color="cyan" summary="Design approved, suggest "Moved to Waiting For" announcement copy">
CONSENSUS: APPROVED on the full design proposal.

One UX note on the HTMX announcement text: "Clarified as waiting for" is developer language. Users don't think in terms of "clarifying." Consider "Moved to Waiting For" instead -- it tells the user where the item went, which is what they care about. Same pattern as if we said "Moved to Next Actions" for the other clarify paths.

Not blocking -- just a copy suggestion for the Driver to consider during implementation.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Steve Krug's copy suggestion was already implemented -- the announce text is "Moved to Waiting For" exactly as he suggested.

input.content: Thanks Steve. Already implemented -- the announce text is "Moved to Waiting For" exactly as you suggested. You can verify in `src/routes/inbox.rs` line 241 and in the integration test `htmx_clarify_as_waiting_for_returns_empty_body_with_announce` which asserts the HX-Trigger contains "Moved to Waiting For".
input.summary: Confirm "Moved to Waiting For" copy already implemented

routing.summary: Confirm "Moved to Waiting For" copy already implemented

content.text: All 8 reviewers have responded with no blocking issues. Explicit CONSENSUS: APPROVED from Carson, Steve Schoger, Heydon, and Steve Krug. Design approved/no blockers from Scott, Kent, Lea, and Marty. Waiting for team lead to confirm we can proceed with commit.
